allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const h=fs.readFileSync\('dist/index.html','utf8'\); const lines=h.split\('\\n'\); lines.forEach\(\(l,i\)=>{ if\(l.includes\('hero-tagline'\)||l.includes\('hero-photo'\)||l.includes\('hero-inner'\)||l.includes\('공학자'\)||l.includes\('한국현'\)\) console.log\(i+1, l.trim\(\).slice\(0,120\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const h=fs.readFileSync\('dist/index.html','utf8'\); ['hero-tagline','hero-photo','hero-inner','공학자','한국현 \(Kuk'].forEach\(term=>{ const idx=h.indexOf\(term\); if\(idx>=0\) console.log\(JSON.stringify\(term\), '->', JSON.stringify\(h.slice\(idx,idx+80\)\)\); else console.log\(JSON.stringify\(term\), '-> NOT FOUND'\); }\);")
